description: Use this API to write an extended raw data file from data in the current working case, specifying a subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = writerawxsubsys(sid, all, status, sfile, domains)
python_syntax: ierr = writerawxsubsys(sid, all, status, sfile, domains)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying options. (input).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Filename of the extended power flow raw data file. (input).

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: Comma separated string of rawx domains to write to sfile. (input; all domains by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.
process all buses when STATUS(4) = 0; area ties only when STATUS(4) = 1.

status.description: include records for Type 4 buses (1 by default).
include records for out-of-service branches (1 by default).
include records for equipment in the subsystem (1 by default).
include records for subsystem ties (0 by default).
include load record option (honored when ALL=0) (0 by default).
for all loads at subsystem buses.
for subsystem loads at all buses.
for all loads at subsystem buses and subsystem loads at non-subsystem buses.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
